sentence: Glarp up all you want. Vagynyamaxxing still shows through the new outfit.

wombos.definition: Maximally combining vanity, edge, cornball energy, and beta posturing into a single insufferable presentation. A vagynya maxxer is its practitioner.
wombos.example: I thought he was quiche but now all I see is vagynyamaxxing.

wombos.definition: To pretend to have undergone a glow-up — performing a transformation in appearance or status without the genuine change to support it.
wombos.example: He bought one new outfit and started glarping up like he's a whole new person.
